projectDescription: An enhanced UniApp engineering framework that integrates AI collaboration, improves developer experience, and reduces cognitive overhead through conventions and opinionated project structure.
keyFeatures: Root context (defineRootContext) for app-level state shared across pages
Layout system with named layouts (default, tabbar, custom)
Page meta declaration via definePageMeta() in SFCs
Opinionated project structure reducing repetitive setup
AI collaboration integration for enhanced developer productivity
CLI commands: oiyo dev, oiyo build, oiyo prepare
Vite plugin for seamless UniApp integration
publicApiSurface: defineRootContext() — app-level reactive state shared across all pages
definePageMeta() — declare layout and page style per SFC
<OiyoLayout> — component wrapping named layouts in App.vue
<OiyoPage> — component rendering the active page inside a layout
oiyo dev — CLI command to start dev server
oiyo build — CLI command to build for target platform
oiyo prepare — CLI command run on postinstall setup
